SELECT ?player ?bestRank (COUNT(?title) AS ?titles) WHERE {
  wd:Q2070302 wdt:P710 ?player .
  ?player wdt:P1535 ?bestRank .
  ?title wdt:P361 wd:Q1360577 .
  ?title wdt:P170 ?player .
  ?title wdt:P582 ?endDate .
  FILTER(?endDate < "2002-02-03T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
} GROUP BY ?player ?bestRank
ORDER BY ?bestRank ASC ?titles DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2
